name: Defined Benefit Plan

contribution.description: defined benefit plan contribution (max varies by age, $50K-$300K)

actionability.retroactive_note: Plan had to be established by Dec 31, 2025

description: Establish a defined benefit pension plan for large, tax-deductible contributions. Contribution limits based on actuarial calculations. Requires professional setup.
deadline: Plan established by Dec 31, contributions by filing deadline
